title: Turn the findings into next actions with owners and due dates.

messages.content: Turn the findings into next actions with owners and due dates.

- **Action:** Conduct security review and due‑diligence before onboarding any new third‑party provider.  
  **Owner role:** IT/Security Department (approves onboarding).  
  **Timing/due date:** Proposed timing: Prior to onboarding.  
  **Evidence:** “No entity … will be onboarded without the approval of Grambling State University Information Technology/Security Department.”; “Due Diligence efforts will include a review …”; “Security review will happen prior to onboarding new provider.” (p.2)  
  **Priority:** High  

- **Action:** Assign a point of contact for each third‑party/vendor during the onboarding process.  
  **Owner role:** IT/Security Department (or designated Vendor Management role).  
  **Timing/due date:** Proposed timing: As part of onboarding.  
  **Evidence:** “Grambling State University will provide a point of contact for each third party or vendor as part of the onboarding process.” (p.2)  
  **Priority:** Medium  

- **Action:** Enforce that third‑party credentials are uniquely identifiable and follow university password policies.  
  **Owner role:** IT/Security Department (security team).  
  **Timing/due date:** Proposed timing: Ongoing – enforce at onboarding and periodically.  
  **Evidence:** “Third party credentials must be uniquely identifiable, and password management must follow Grambling State University’s password procedures and policies.” (p.2)  
  **Priority:** High  

- **Action:** Perform an annual review of existing providers’ security programs and controls.  
  **Owner role:** IT/Security Department (or Vendor Management team).  
  **Timing/due date:** Proposed timing: Annually.  
  **Evidence:** “Existing providers will undergo an annual review to continually monitor their security program and controls.” (p.2)  
  **Priority:** Medium  

- **Action:** Require immediate surrender of all equipment and supplies upon contract termination or university request.  
  **Owner role:** Contract/Procurement Manager (proposed).  
  **Timing/due date:** Proposed timing: Upon termination or request.  
  **Evidence:** “Upon termination of a contract or at the request of Grambling State University, the third party must surrender all equipment and supplies immediately.” (p.1)  
  **Priority:** High  

- **Action:** Ensure third‑party personnel report all security incidents directly to their assigned point of contact.  
  **Owner role:** Assigned Point of Contact (role).  
  **Timing/due date:** Proposed timing: Immediately upon incident.  
  **Evidence:** “Third party personnel must report all security incidents directly to their assigned point of contact.” (p.2)  
  **Priority:** High  

- **Action:** Verify third‑party compliance with university auditing requirements.  
  **Owner role:** IT/Security Department or Internal Audit (proposed).  
  **Timing/due date:** Proposed timing: Ongoing – as part of regular audits.  
  **Evidence:** “Third parties are required to comply with Grambling State University’s auditing requirements.” (p.1)  
  **Priority:** Medium
